headers.subject: UTC ACM's First Meeting of the Semester!

body.plain_text:
Hey everyone!
We’re kicking off the semester with the first UTC ACM meeting, and we’d love to see you there!
When: Friday, January 30th, 2026 at 12:00 PM
Where: ECS Building, Room 321
We’ll have pizza and a fun icebreaker activity to help everyone meet and connect—so come hungry and ready to hang out!
It’s a great chance to meet other students interested in computing and get a preview of what ACM has planned for the semester. Whether you’re a returning member or brand new, you’re more than welcome.
Join our Discord to stay up to date with all club events: https://discord.gg/ssJhudVntc
Let’s start the semester strong.
Best regards,
The UTC ACM Team


########################################################################

To unsubscribe from the CSE-GRAD list, click the following link:
http://raven.utc.edu/SCRIPTS/WA.EXE?TICKET=NzM5Njc0IHdqcjQ4NkBNT0NTLlVUQy5FRFUgQ1NFLUdSQUQgIMXABQ%2FWx4qE&c=SIGNOFF
